setting: A couple is breaking up and one person is moving out of their shared apartment.
lyrics:
I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time

You ain't gotta be shy I want the neighbors to hear it
The way we used to do it in the beginning
So take your time
I'm waiting at the door
And imma do it do it do it do it do it 'til you want more

(Temperature's gettin' hot don't fight it)
I don't give a damn what you say you gotta do baby
(Kiss ya lips so soft then bite it)

When I'm through you gon' wish
that you never would have gave me up

I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time

Remember back in the day I said nobody was better
And I was gonna change your life forever
You took me for granted
Thought it was a game
You 'bout to get it so good
that your next man will know my name

(Let your hair down baby turn the lights off)
Grab a life vest we're sailing into ecstacy

(Don't hold back baby just shout out)
It's the last time you gonna have a man
give it to you like me

I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time

I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time

lyricsJa.en:
I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
lyricsJa.ja:
荷造りをしているよ、もう旅は終わったから
僕たち、お互いにふさわしくなかったんだ

lyricsJa.en:
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time
lyricsJa.ja:
僕が一生懸命やろうとするたびに、散々な思いをさせられた
今夜、最後にもう一度、その分を返してもらうよ

lyricsJa.en:
You ain't gotta be shy I want the neighbors to hear it
The way we used to do it in the beginning
lyricsJa.ja:
恥ずかしがらなくていい、隣人にも聞こえるくらいにしたい
最初の頃みたいに

lyricsJa.en:
So take your time
I'm waiting at the door
lyricsJa.ja:
だからゆっくりでいい
玄関で待ってるから

lyricsJa.en: And imma do it do it do it do it do it 'til you want more
lyricsJa.ja: もっと欲しいと思うまで、ずっとそうしてあげる

lyricsJa.en:
(Temperature's gettin' hot don't fight it)
I don't give a damn what you say you gotta do baby
lyricsJa.ja:
（熱くなってきた、抵抗しないで）
あなたが何を言おうと、知ったことじゃない

lyricsJa.en: (Kiss ya lips so soft then bite it)
lyricsJa.ja: （やわらかい唇に口づけして、甘く噛んで）

lyricsJa.en:
When I'm through you gon' wish
that you never would have gave me up
lyricsJa.ja:
終わった時には後悔するよ
僕を手放さなければよかったって

lyricsJa.en:
I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time
lyricsJa.ja:
荷造りをしているよ、もう旅は終わったから
僕たち、お互いにふさわしくなかったんだ
僕が一生懸命やろうとするたびに、散々な思いをさせられた
今夜、最後にもう一度、その分を返してもらうよ

lyricsJa.en:
Remember back in the day I said nobody was better
And I was gonna change your life forever
lyricsJa.ja:
覚えてるかな、昔は君より素晴らしい人なんていないと言っていた
君の人生を永遠に変えてみせると思っていた

lyricsJa.en:
You took me for granted
Thought it was a game
lyricsJa.ja:
君は僕のことをないがしろにして
ゲームみたいに思っていたんだ

lyricsJa.en:
You 'bout to get it so good
that your next man will know my name
lyricsJa.ja:
次に付き合う男も僕の名前を知るくらい
最高のものをあげるよ

lyricsJa.en:
(Let your hair down baby turn the lights off)
Grab a life vest we're sailing into ecstacy
lyricsJa.ja:
（髪をほどいて、電気を消して）
救命胴衣を掴んで、至福の海に漕ぎ出そう

lyricsJa.en:
(Don't hold back baby just shout out)
It's the last time you gonna have a man
give it to you like me
lyricsJa.ja:
（遠慮しないで、叫んでいいから）
僕みたいに愛してくれる男は
これが最後だから

lyricsJa.en:
I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time
lyricsJa.ja:
荷造りをしているよ、もう旅は終わったから
僕たち、お互いにふさわしくなかったんだ
僕が一生懸命やろうとするたびに、散々な思いをさせられた
今夜、最後にもう一度、その分を返してもらうよ

lyricsJa.en:
I'm packing my bags 'cuz the journey is over
And we were never good enough for each other
You put me through hell every time that I tried
Tonight I'm gonna make you pay one last time
lyricsJa.ja:
荷造りをしているよ、もう旅は終わったから
僕たち、お互いにふさわしくなかったんだ
僕が一生懸命やろうとするたびに、散々な思いをさせられた
今夜、最後にもう一度、その分を返してもらうよ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I've finally finished packing my bags.
sentences.displayHtml: I've finally finished packing my bags.

sentences.text: I guess our journey is officially over.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess our journey is officially over.

conversation.japanese: ようやく荷造りが終わったよ。僕たちの旅も、これで本当におしまいだね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I can't believe it's actually happening.
sentences.displayHtml: I can't believe it's actually happening.

sentences.text: Did you really have to say we were never good enough for each other?
sentences.displayHtml: Did you really have to say we were never good enough for each other?

conversation.japanese: 本当に終わっちゃうなんて信じられない。「お互いにふさわしくなかった」なんて、本気で思ってるの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You took me for granted for way too long.
sentences.displayHtml: You took me for granted for way too long.

conversation.japanese: 正直に言ってるだけだよ。君はあまりに長い間、僕のことをないがしろにしていたから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe I did, but you put me through hell sometimes, too.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe I did, but you put me through hell sometimes, too.

sentences.text: It wasn't always easy for me.
sentences.displayHtml: It wasn't always easy for me.

conversation.japanese: そうだったかもしれないけど、あなただって私にひどい思いをさせたじゃない。私だって楽じゃなかったわ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Anyway, just take your time getting the rest of your things.
sentences.displayHtml: Anyway, just take your time getting the rest of your things.

conversation.japanese: 分かってる。とにかく、残りの荷物はゆっくり片付けていいから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I'm just waiting at the door for my ride to arrive.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm just waiting at the door for my ride to arrive.

conversation.japanese: ありがとう。迎えの車が来るのを、玄関で待ってるわ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'll always remember how things were back in the day.
sentences.displayHtml: I'll always remember how things were back in the day.

conversation.japanese: 急がなくていいよ。昔の楽しかった時のことは、ずっと覚えてるから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I really thought we could change things, but I guess it's too late.
sentences.displayHtml: I really thought we could change things, but I guess it's too late.

conversation.japanese: 私もよ。何かを変えられるって信じてたけど、もう手遅れみたいね。
